THE ULTIMATE DISCORD WORKSPACE & SUPPORT SYSTEM

The only Discord workspace & support manager your server will ever need

Nora Studio simplifies your community's ticketing, autoresponders, member color roles, and logging. Trusted by communities worldwide to run fast, secure, and customizable support workflows.

Nora Bot
Live Interactive Demo
Nora Support Workspace Hub Welcome to our support center! Click one of the categories below to launch a private support channel. Our server staff will be paged immediately to assist you.

Powerful Features for Discord Communities

Everything you need to manage support tickets, roles, and logs no matter how big your community grows.

Support Tickets
Roblox Verification
Custom Commands
Invite Tracker
Leveling Engine

Instant Support Ticket Creation

Allow members to spawn private support channels instantly at the click of a button. Nora handles permissions, staff mentions, and setups automatically behind the scenes.

# ticket-0042

Ticket created by @Member. Staff will be with you shortly.

Support Ticketing Suite

Deploy customizable support panels with custom questions, claim queues, inactivity sweep timers, and permanent HTML transcripts.

Roblox Integration Desk

Automatically synchronize member server roles with Roblox group ranks and manage verification mapping states dynamically.

Custom Commands & Autoresponders

Set trigger phrases to execute auto-replies, incorporating ignore filters for staff/bots and role-specific conditional restrictions.

Invite Tracker Logs

Announce joins, trace active invite links, count inviter stats, and configure welcome templating variables.

Advanced Leveling Engine

Earn experience (XP) through chat and voice channels, set multiplier roles, and configure automatic milestone role rewards.

Granular Server Audits

Log 15+ server events (message updates, channel edits, voice swaps, boosting actions) into specific log rooms.

Automated AutoMod Shield

Instantly block server slurs, mass mentions, profanity, scam URLs, and duplicate spam in real-time memory.

Moderation Desk

Equip staff with quick-moderation commands for warning thresholds, temporary bans, mutes, deafening, and purging.

Interactive Games & Fun

Engage members with Guess-the-Number, Rock-Paper-Scissors (RPS), and global leaderboard integrations.

Polls & Announcements

Launch styled server voting grids, query feedback, and broadcast server notifications cleanly.

Translation Engine

Instantly translate text content via slash commands, allowing global members to chat in any language.

Nora AI Companion

Interact with local and API-driven Artificial Intelligence models to answer questions, analyze statistics, and guide users.

Choose the Right Plan for Your Community

Compare Nora Studio Free and Pro tiers to find the perfect fit for your Discord server.

Feature Nora Free Nora Pro
Unlimited Support Tickets
Support Ticket Panels Limit 5 Panels Unlimited Panels
Custom Panel Embed Colors
Permanent HTML Transcripts
Role-Based Permissions
Ticket Claiming & Categories
Web dashboard Ticketing Console
Advanced Auto-Close Inactivity Rules
Panel Templating & Layout Backups
Premium Custom Role Color Hover Effects

Automated Ticket Management

Configure automatic triggers, inactivity warning timers, and smart close presets. Keep your Discord categories clean without manual moderation overhead, saving staff hours every day.

INACTIVITY AUTOMATION

This ticket has been marked inactive. It will archive in 24 hours.

Complete Ticket Transparency

Every ticket generates an offline transcript with log details, claim indicators, and messages. Never lose community context and maintain comprehensive auditing logs.

TRANSCRIPT GENERATED

Ticket closed. Access transcript at nora.studio/transcripts/42

Fully Customizable Experience

Brand every single aspect. From panel description texts, colors, custom action button emojis, and modal fields to the final offline transcript header styles.

Nora Premium Customization

Zero forced branding. Clean layout that feels native to your community.

Ready to Elevate Your Server Support?

Set up Nora Support Workspace in under five minutes. No credit card required.
